mapinfo.detailsText:
CBE Wilderness Baseline: a clean test map for the Biome Theme + Region Flavor generation model.
 
 Baseline: vanilla-safe starts and resources only
 Rogue camps: disabled
 Bestiary: disabled
mapinfo.loadDetailsText:
A clean CBE wilderness baseline. This version only proves the theme architecture: Biome Theme + Region Flavor. Extra systems will be layered in after this loads reliably.
 
 Baseline: vanilla-safe starts and resources only
 Rogue camps: disabled
 Bestiary: disabled
